title: QOL-MC
description:
Quality of Life MC adds multiple mods for decorating, exploring, and feeling immersed.

New version and changes coming soon! If you have any suggestions please contact me!
body:
QOL-MC adds multiple decoration, farming, exploring, terrain generation, and structure generation mods. Doesn't add complicated mods like other modpacks.

Making the game a little more realistic but not adding too many complicated mods that make gameplay complicated. This modpack was originally made for myself but I decided to keep working on it and will provide constant updates to make sure it is maintained.

What you can expect:
- More Biomes to explore
- More Farming options and flora
- Interesting caves to explore
- Many new Mobs and Creatures
- Updated sound physics mod to make the game feel more immersive
- Updated Villages and Village Generation
- Realistic Tree Generation
- Countless amounts of furniture and building blocks to decorate with
- Improved Monument Generation
- Additional Structures to Explore

  ![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ede27e374908dc2934d066e06646f9c95e18bd0.png)

After Downloading:
- Make sure to go to the modpack settings and manually override the Java Memory to allow for at least 4000(4GB) for the best experience, forgetting to do this may result in the modpack not starting or running out of memory!
